prompt_used:
You are a QA analyst creating concise test case ideas from selected medical-device manual sections.

Generate 3 to 5 QA test case ideas that verify the behavior, limits, and user-visible outcomes described in the selected sections.

Return ONLY valid JSON. Do not include markdown fences. Do not include prose before or after the JSON.

The JSON must have exactly this shape:
{
  "test_cases": [
    {
      "title": "short descriptive title",
      "steps": ["step 1", "step 2"],
      "expected_result": "observable expected result"
    }
  ]
}

Rules:
- Produce between 3 and 5 test cases.
- Each title must be non-empty.
- Each test case must have at least one step.
- Each expected_result must be non-empty.
- Base every test case only on the selected source sections below.

Selected source sections:
Logical ID: 4.2
Heading: Error Codes
Body:
| Code | Meaning | Device Behavior |
|---|---|---|
| E1 | Cuff not connected or leak detected | Aborts measurement, displays E1 |
| E2 | Motion artifact detected during measurement | Aborts measurement, displays E2, prompts retry |
| E3 | Overpressure condition | Auto-deflates within 2 seconds, displays E3 |
| E4 | Low battery during measurement | Aborts measurement, displays E4 |
| E5 | Internal sensor fault | Device disables measurement function, displays E5 until serviced |

---

Logical ID: 3.2
Heading: Cuff Inflation Sequence
Body:
On starting a measurement, the device inflates the cuff to an initial target of 180 mmHg. If the user's pulse is not detected by 180 mmHg, the device inflates in 40 mmHg increments up to a maximum of 299 mmHg before aborting with an error. Deflation occurs in controlled steps of approximately 3 mmHg to capture oscillometric pulse data.
raw_llm_response: {"test_cases": [{"title": "Verify overpressure error code E3 deflates within the documented time", "steps": ["Simulate an overpressure condition during measurement.", "Observe the displayed error code and cuff deflation behavior."], "expected_result": "The device displays E3 and auto-deflates within 2 seconds."}, {"title": "Verify cuff inflation increments after pulse is not detected", "steps": ["Start a measurement with no pulse detected by 180 mmHg.", "Observe the subsequent inflation increments until measurement aborts or pulse is detected."], "expected_result": "The cuff inflates in 40 mmHg increments up to a maximum of 299 mmHg before aborting with an error."}, {"title": "Verify low battery error during measurement", "steps": ["Configure the device battery state to low during an active measurement.", "Start or continue the measurement and observe the displayed error code."], "expected_result": "The device aborts measurement and displays E4."}]}

parsed_test_cases.title: Verify overpressure error code E3 deflates within the documented time
steps: Simulate an overpressure condition during measurement.
Observe the displayed error code and cuff deflation behavior.
parsed_test_cases.expected_result: The device displays E3 and auto-deflates within 2 seconds.

parsed_test_cases.title: Verify cuff inflation increments after pulse is not detected
steps: Start a measurement with no pulse detected by 180 mmHg.
Observe the subsequent inflation increments until measurement aborts or pulse is detected.
parsed_test_cases.expected_result: The cuff inflates in 40 mmHg increments up to a maximum of 299 mmHg before aborting with an error.

parsed_test_cases.title: Verify low battery error during measurement
steps: Configure the device battery state to low during an active measurement.
Start or continue the measurement and observe the displayed error code.
parsed_test_cases.expected_result: The device aborts measurement and displays E4.

Heading: Cuff Inflation Sequence
Body:

If the user's pulse is not detected by 180 mmHg, the device inflates in 40 mmHg increments up to a maximum of 299 mmHg before aborting with an error. Logical ID: 3.2
Heading: Cuff Inflation Sequence
Body:
On starting a measurement, the device inflates the cuff to an initial target of 180 mmHg. If the user's pulse is not detected by 180 mmHg, the device inflates in 40 mmHg increments up to a maximum of 299 mmHg before aborting with an error. Deflation occurs in controlled steps of approximately 3 mmHg to capture oscillometric pulse data.

parsed_test_cases.title: Cuff Not Connected Error
steps: Start a measurement with the cuff not connected
parsed_test_cases.expected_result: The device aborts the measurement and displays error code E1

parsed_test_cases.title: Motion Artifact Detection
parsed_test_cases.expected_result: The device aborts the measurement, displays error code E2, and prompts the user to retry

parsed_test_cases.title: Cuff Inflation Sequence
steps: Start a measurement with a user's pulse not detectable at 180 mmHg
parsed_test_cases.expected_result: The device inflates the cuff in 40 mmHg increments up to a maximum of 299 mmHg before aborting with an error

parsed_test_cases.title: Overpressure Condition
parsed_test_cases.expected_result: The device auto-deflates within 2 seconds and displays error code E3

parsed_test_cases.title: Low Battery During Measurement
steps: Start a measurement with low battery
parsed_test_cases.expected_result: The device aborts the measurement and displays error code E4
